para.as_written: نجز بعون الله وتوفيقه ميمر الراعي وهو خاتمة الكتاب المقدس والشكر لله دائما وكان الفراغ منه يوم الثلاثاء السابع من شهر نيسان سنة ستة آلاف وسبعمائة وأربعة وثلاثين من سنين أبينا آدم الموافق لشهر ربيع الآخر سنة ستمائة وثلاثة وعشرين للهجرة وكتبه العبد الحقير الخاطئ متى الطور سيناء المدعو بالاسم راهب وكان نساخة في قلاية في قلاية رهبان طور سيناء بمدينة دمشق بكنيسة مريم فمن قرأ فيه وسامع بما فيه من الغلط وذكر ناسخة الخاطئ بغفران الخطايا والمسامحة وكتبه لنفسه وهو بعد حياة الرهبان المقيمين بجبل طور سيناء غفر الله لمن قرأ فيه ولمن دعا لمن كتبه
translation: … here ends the holy book …, the completion of which was on Tuesday 7 in the month of Nīsān [March–April] in the Year of Our Father Adam [Anno Mundi] 6734, which fell in the month of Rabī‘ al-Ākhar [Rabī‘ ath-Thānī] in the year of the Hegira [AH] 623, and Matthew of the Mount Sinai, who is known as a monk, copied it, and its copying occurred in the residence of Mount Sinai monks in the city of Damascus at the Cathedral of Mary [Mariamite Cathedral of Damascus] …

note: Mount Sinai monks in the city of Damascus at the Cathedral of Mary [Mariamite Cathedral of Damascus]

location.repository: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai

bib.citation: Kāmil, Murād. Catalogue of All Manuscripts in the Monastery of St. Catherine on Mount Sinai. Harrassowitz, 1970

program.label: Sinai Library Digitization Project, Phase 1
program.description: Digitized under the Sinai Library Digitization Project, Phase 1 (2018-2023), a collaboration of St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, with funding from the Arcadia Fund, the Ahmanson Foundation, and the Steinmetz Family Foundation. The project provided high-resolution images and basic description of the Arabic and Syriac manuscripts held in the Monastery’s library.

image_provenance.rights: All manuscript images are the property of St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai. No part of these images may be reproduced, reused, or distributed without prior written permission. For permissions and reuse requests, please contact sinai@library.ucla.edu.
